MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Arnold Evje, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff M.S. Amin.
Robert Kane, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant(s) Alvin Taylor and Carlette Leeks.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement "Judgment pursuant to stipulation", which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of Jan. 4, 2010 is vacated.
